UnbindCfw.instanceType: Instance type, valid values: [ eip | nat | etGateway | peerconn | csn | ipv6Gateway ]
UnbindCfw.instances.region: Region, valid values: [ bj | gz | su | fsh | hkg | bd | fwh | sin ]
UnbindCfw.instances.instanceId: The ID of the associated instance
UnbindCfw.instances.role: PEERCONN-specific attribute, local role, valid values: [ acceptor | initiator ], required when the instance being bound or unbound is of type PEERCONN
UnbindCfw.instances.memberId: CSN-specific attribute, network instance ID within the CSN, required when the instance being bound or unbound is of type CSN
